message.name: message1
message.title: Alibi Confirmed
message.text:
I've talked to Donald Parker's boss and his colleagues. They have confirmed that he was at the restaurant from 9:30 pm through 5 am.
Looks like you can check him off your POI list!

message.name: message2
message.title: Warrant
message.text:
Natalie Perez is awake and waiting for you in the hospital. Since she's our prime arson suspect, the judge has issued a warrant that allows you to look into her patient report.
Good luck!

message.name: message3
message.title: Tying up loose ends
message.text:
Time to wrap up the case. Click the attachment to file your report.
Catherine
